task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Annual Report 2023' document in the Projects workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Platform interface shows the 'Annual Report 2023' document opened, with breadcrumbs or navigation indicating it is located in the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Update the document description to the required text
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit screen or modal is open for the document, and the description field contains exactly 'Approved annual report for fiscal year 2023 - Final release'.
The document's summary or main view page displays the updated description 'Approved annual report for fiscal year 2023 - Final release' in standard view mode (not edit mode).

task_completion.description: Initiate versioning, select Major version, and input the version comment
task_completion.visual_evidence: A versioning prompt, modal, or form is visible where 'Major version' (or 1.0) is selected, and the text 'First approved release' is entered into the version comment box.

task_completion.description: Verify the major version 1.0 and comment are successfully created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document's header, version history, or state indicator shows that the current version is 1.0 (or v1.0) and the comment 'First approved release' is recorded in the version history.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Nuxeo web interface rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Nuxeo web UI in a browser window. There should be no terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts to update the document via API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the actual Nuxeo Platform web application. The agent must not simply paste the expected description and comments into a local text editor or a blank webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the version was created using the system's actual versioning mechanism
integrity.visual_evidence: The version 1.0 must be reflected in the system's official version badge/history tab, not just typed manually into the document's title or description fields as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in Nuxeo Platform. The target document path is /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023. The expected description is exactly 'Approved annual report for fiscal year 2023 - Final release'. The expected version is Major version 1.0 (major=1, minor=0). The expected version comment is exactly 'First approved release'.
